AMD is reportedly going to use 14A nodes on its Zen 7 processors which will cause direct competition for Intel who is also currently working on the tech. 
Source

articles.title: Just Cause Developer Working on Live-Service Multiplayer Game
articles.summary:
Just Cause developer Avalanche Studios put out job listings seeking talents to work on a multiplayer live-service game built in Unreal Engine 5.
Source

articles.title: PlayStation Shuts Down Destruction AllStars Five Years Later
articles.summary:
PlayStation has announced it's officially shutting down its multiplayer live-service PS5 game, Destruction AllStars, five years after launch.
Source
